topics.title: Topics
topics.placeholder: Browse civic topics by category. Content will appear here.
topics.intro: Pick a category to see short lessons you can read in your language.
topics.loadCategoriesError: Could not load categories. Check that the API is running.
topics.loadTopicsError: Could not load topics for this category.
topics.unexpectedState: Something went wrong. Go back to Topics from the menu.

rights.title: Rights
rights.placeholder: Know your rights. Content will appear here.

getInvolved.title: Get Involved
getInvolved.placeholder: Local representatives, organizations, and events will appear here.
getInvolved.intro: Use your location or pick a sample city to see civic listings from the database.
getInvolved.locationHint: Share your location to see nearby listings, or pick a city below.
getInvolved.loadError: Could not load local listings. Try again in a moment.
getInvolved.pickLocation: Choose a location to see representatives, organizations, and events.

politics.title: Politics
politics.placeholder: Current issues and neutral perspectives will appear here.

settings.title: Settings
settings.placeholder: Account and preferences will appear here.
settings.intro: Create an account to save progress as you read topics (stored in Supabase).
settings.supabaseMissing: Supabase is not configured. Add VITE_SUPABASE_URL and VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY to your frontend environment.
settings.checkEmail: Check your email to confirm your account, if required by your project.

home.tagline: How can Civitas help you today?

questions.q1: What are my rights during a police stop?
questions.q2: How do I register to vote in my area?
questions.q3: Who is my city council representative?
questions.q4: What are my rights as a tenant?
questions.q5: How do I attend a city council meeting?
questions.q6: What are the main political issues right now?

chat.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please wait {{seconds}} seconds, then try again.
chat.rateLimitedGeneric: Too many requests. Please wait a moment, then try again.
